actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Date_of_Birth_Set_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Date of Birth Set on Account

value.stringValue: Date of Birth set on the Account from the Opportunity Line Item

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Set_Billing_Address_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Set Billing Address on Account

value.stringValue: Billing Address Updated on Account from Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Set_Gender_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Set Gender on Account

value.stringValue: Gender Updated on Account from Opportunity Line Item

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Set_Phone_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Set Phone on Account

value.stringValue: Phone Updated on Account from Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Demographics_Don_t_Match
actionCalls.label: Log - Demographics Don't Match

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Account_and_Opportunity_Address_Missing_Info
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Account and Opportunity Address Missing Info

value.stringValue: Unable to set Billing Address on Account because one or many of the Opportunity Shipping Address fields are empty

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_to_Update_the_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed to Update the Account

value.stringValue: Failed to Update the Account with latest demographics

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Lab_Orders_Fault
actionCalls.label: Log - Get Lab Orders - Fault

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Set_Billing_Address_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Set Billing Address on Account

value.stringValue: Billing Address was updated on the Account from Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Set_Date_Of_Birth_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Set Date Of Birth on Account

value.stringValue: Date of Birth was updated on the Account from Opportunity Line Item

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Set_Gender_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Set Gender on Account

value.stringValue: Gender was updated on the Account from Opportunity Line Item

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Set_Phone_on_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Set Phone on Account

value.stringValue: Phone was updated on the Account from Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Updated_Account_From_Line_Item
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Updated Account From Line Item

value.stringValue: Updated Account From Opportunity Line Item

actionCalls.name: Log_Initialize_Flow
actionCalls.label: Log - Initialize Flow

actionCalls.name: Log_Initialized_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Initialized - Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Lab_Order_De_Registered
actionCalls.label: Log - Lab Order De-Registered

actionCalls.name: Log_Lab_Order_Registered
actionCalls.label: Log - Lab Order Registered

actionCalls.name: Log_No_Lab_Orders_Found
actionCalls.label: Log - No Lab Orders Found

actionCalls.name: Log_Success_Update_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Success Update Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Update_Lab_Order_Fault

assignments.name: Set_Account_Billing_Address_to_Opp_Shipping_Address
assignments.label: Set Account Billing Address to Opp Shipping Address

assignments.name: Set_Account_Phone_to_Opportunity_Phone
assignments.label: Set Account Phone to Opportunity Phone

assignments.description: Since the DOB was not set to 1/1/1920 we will set to what is on the account
assignments.name: Set_DOB_Existing
assignments.label: Set DOB - Existing

assignments.description: Since the DOB was 1/1/1920 we will set to what was passed in.
assignments.name: Set_DOB_New
assignments.label: Set DOB - New

assignments.description: Gender existed, we are going to set to the existing one.
assignments.name: Set_Gender_Existing
assignments.label: Set Gender - Existing

assignments.description: Gender didn't use to exist we are going to set the gender.
assignments.name: Set_Gender_New
assignments.label: Set Gender - New

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Is_Registered_Flag_Deregister
assignments.label: Set Lab Is Registered Flag - Deregister

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Status_and_Reason
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Status and Reason

decisions.name: Account_Phone_is_Null
decisions.label: Account Phones are Null
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Account Phone Fields are Populated

rules.name: Yes_Account_Phone_Fields_are_Null
rules.label: Yes - Account Phone Fields are Null

decisions.description: Here we check if the demographics fields are filled in or not. If they are not we need to de-register the lab order.
decisions.name: Are_Fields_Filled_In
decisions.label: Are Fields Filled In

decisions.description: We check to see if we need to update the DOB or Gender
decisions.name: Do_We_Need_to_Update_the_Account
decisions.label: Do We Need to Update the Account

rules.name: Yes_One_or_More_Fields_Null
rules.label: Yes - One or More Fields Null

decisions.description: We use 1920 as a default DOB to allow syncing the the EHR system.
decisions.name: Is_Account_Date_of_Birth_1920
decisions.label: Is Account Date of Birth 1920

rules.name: Yes_One_or_More_Fields_Null_Opportunity
rules.label: Yes - One or More Fields Null

Flow.description: This flow will run anytime the service that is being rendered is Precision Genetic Test and any of the required fields are edited.

formulas.description: Formula will compare demographic values from Opportunity Product and Account and return what is not matching
formulas.name: form_txtMismatchedValues
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.Gender__c}) != TEXT({!Get_Lab_Order.Gender__c}), "❌ Gender Mismatch" & BR(), "" ) & IF( {!$Record.Opportunity.Account.FirstName} != {!Get_Lab_Order.First_Name__c} || {!$Record.Opportunity.Account.LastName} != {!Get_Lab_Order.Last_Name__c}, "❌ Name Mismatch" & BR(), "" ) & IF( {!$Record.Opportunity.Account.DateOfBirth__c} != {!Get_Lab_Order.Date_of_Birth__c}, "❌ DOB Mismatch" & BR(), "" )

Flow.interviewLabel: Record Trigger - Opportunity Product - Set Kit Registered {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Opportunity Product - Set Kit Registered

textTemplates.name: txt_DemographicsDontMatch
txt_FlowStartedBy
textTemplates.text: Set Kit Registered was initiated by {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}
